description: Per-section recipe table — which library wins for which section, with fallbacks. Phase 2 (task #66) resolved all phase2:tbd placeholders against verified library catalogs.

hero-video.vendoredReason: Full control over autoplay + muted + playsInline + posterFrame logic. Critical to LCP.

hero-animated.notes: cult-ui has no 'hero-pill' component (Phase 1 plan name) — closest match is the hero-dithering family (split-layout shader heroes with tech-stack badges). Substituted hero-dithering as the fallback. aceternity:hero-highlight verified present in live registry (registry:ui type, deps: mini-svg-data-uri + motion).

features-grid.notes: cult-ui has no 'feature-cards' component (Phase 1 plan name) — exposes only feature-carousel / feature-poll / feature-voting. feature-carousel chosen as canonical features-grid default (smooth transitions + customizable layouts, closest to the original intent). watermelon has no 'adaptive-grid' — substituted bento-1 from the 17-variant bento series, which is the closest grid-style fallback.

testimonials.notes: cult-ui has NO testimonial component (verified — 'testimonial' substring matches zero entries in the live registry). Reassigned default to watermelon:testimonials-1 (verified present in the 963-entry watermelon registry). aceternity:infinite-moving-cards verified present and retained as fallback per operator's original intent.

faq.vendoredReason: AEO-critical — schema markup + visible-text Q&A pairing must be controlled. Never delegated.

section-template.notes: styleui:notio verified present in the 4-entry styleui registry (animated-list, counter, notio, axis). Whole-section template — hero + features + pricing + footer.

loader.notes: dotmatrix slug 'pulse-ladder' (Phase 1 plan name) is the human display label — actual install slug is dotm-square-2 (Pulse Ladder is its display name). Verified against the live registry which exposes slugs in the dotm-<shape>-<n> format. 80 individual loaders total + an 'all' meta-package.

booking-form.vendoredReason: A2P-compliance critical — SmsConsent + audit-trail POST + tagging convention. Build-blocking enforcement.

conflictResolution.tiebreaker: lexicographic library order (aceternity < componentry < cult-ui < dotmatrix < skiper-ui < styleui < watermelon)
